## git
- Set user.name and user.email

## openssh
- Generate an SSH key if needed
- Add the public key to GitHub

## nnn
- The installed binary is named nnn-emoji-static, not nnn
- Run: ln -sf ~/.local/share/mise/installs/github-jarun-nnn/<version>/nnn-emoji-static ~/.local/bin/nnn

## github-cli
- Run `gh auth login`

## codex
- Set `OPENAI_API_KEY`, or run `codex` and follow prompts
